summary: Completed testing of Daily Orientation Question feature. All backend tests pass (16/16). Frontend correctly shows Daily Orientation Question at TOP of Home tab with question text, direction badge, and 'עשיתי את זה' button. Answer submission works correctly - shows completion state after clicking.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: GET /api/orientation/daily-question/{user_id} returns all required fields: success, user_id, identity, question_he, suggested_direction, question_id, already_answered_today
GOOD: Question generation is identity-based - new users get recovery direction with appropriate Hebrew questions
GOOD: Same question returned on same day (persisted in daily_questions collection)
GOOD: POST /api/orientation/daily-answer/{user_id} correctly records action and updates history
GOOD: Invalid question_id returns 404 as expected
GOOD: already_answered_today flag toggles to true after submission
GOOD: Frontend DailyOrientationQuestion component properly positioned at TOP of Home tab
GOOD: Component shows loading skeleton during data fetch
GOOD: Direction badge with Hebrew label (התאוששות for recovery) displayed correctly
GOOD: 'עשיתי את זה' (I did it) button clickable and triggers API call
GOOD: Completion state shows green checkmark, strikethrough text, and 'הושלם היום' message
GOOD: Blue/teal to green gradient transition for completion state
GOOD: data-testid attributes present: daily-orientation-question, daily-question-text, daily-answer-button
seed_data_creation: Each backend test creates unique user IDs to avoid interference
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Orientation Question feature fully tested. Backend persists questions in daily_questions collection with upsert per day per user. Answer submission updates philos_sessions history with value_tag=suggested_direction. Frontend component at /app/frontend/src/components/philos/sections/DailyOrientationQuestion.js. Backend endpoints: GET /api/orientation/daily-question/{user_id}, POST /api/orientation/daily-answer/{user_id}.

frontend_tests.daily_question_text_displayed: PASS - Hebrew question 'איך תרצה להתחיל את המסע שלך?' or 'מה יגרום לך להרגיש טוב היום?'
frontend_tests.direction_badge_displayed: PASS - 'התאוששות' badge visible for new user
frontend_tests.answer_button_visible: PASS - 'עשיתי את זה' button with checkmark icon
frontend_tests.completion_state_displayed: PASS - 'הושלם היום' with green checkmark after submit
frontend_tests.question_text_strikethrough: PASS - line-through class applied in completed state

new_user_question.question_he: איך תרצה להתחיל את המסע שלך?
